src/main/java/com/whl/spring/controller/.general_idea: Replace Apache Commons IO file operations with Java NIO APIs to remove the external dependency.
Replace Apache Commons IO stream copying with Java NIO Files.copy for download responses.
Use Spring's MediaTypeFactory to detect content types dynamically instead of hardcoding octet-stream.
Refactor file path resolution to use a centralized method with System.getProperty instead of ServletContext.
Replace manual 404 text response with a forward to a dedicated 404 error page.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 17 to 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Framework to version 6.1.14 to align with JDK 21 support and latest features.
Upgrade Tomcat to version 11.0.0 to support Jakarta EE 10 and JDK 21.
Upgrade Jakarta Servlet API to version 6.1.0 to match Tomcat 11 and Jakarta EE 10 standards.
Upgrade Jackson to version 2.18.0 for latest bug fixes and JDK 21 compatibility.
Upgrade JUnit to version 5.11.2 (Jupiter) to replace the legacy JUnit 4 dependency.
Upgrade Commons IO to version 2.17.0 for security patches and maintenance.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to version 3.13.0 to ensure proper handling of JDK 21 bytecode.
Upgrade Maven Javadoc Plugin to version 3.10.1 for compatibility with newer JDK documentation tools.
Upgrade Maven Source Plugin to version 3.3.1 for maintenance.
Upgrade Maven War Plugin to version 3.4.0 for maintenance.
Add Maven Antrun Plugin to clean up the libs directory during the validate phase.
Add Maven Dependency Plugin to copy dependencies to a local libs directory during packaging.
Move dependency version definitions into a dedicated dependencyManagement block for cleaner dependency declarations.
Switch Maven repositories from a private Nexus instance to the public Aliyun mirror.
Update groupId, artifactId, and versioning strategy to use a revision property.

.gitignore.general_idea: Simplified gitignore rules by removing redundant target/build directory exclusions for source folders.
Added standard ignore patterns for SVN, macOS, logs, and local artifacts to the gitignore file.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project title from 'spring' to 'spring-demo' for clarity.
Add a note instructing users to add provided-scope dependencies to the classpath.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/templates/index..general_idea: Add a missing <head> section with a <title> to the JSP template to ensure valid HTML structure.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/templates/test.j.general_idea: Replace the reference to the unminified jQuery script with the minified version to reduce payload size.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Configure a custom error page for HTTP 404 Not Found responses.
Configure a custom error page for HTTP 500 Internal Server Error responses.
